title: jasione humilis
intro: Jasione humilis, also known as the small cat's ear, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Jasione humilis include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions or as a dried herb for smoking blends, taking advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
